candidates.row_label: Revenues from crude oil and gas sales
candidates.why: Clear top-line revenue/sales line; more specific and preferable to the subtotal 'Total operating income'.
Operating income subtotal equals revenue here, but it is a broader subtotal and less preferred than the explicit revenue line.

final_choice.row_label: Revenues from crude oil and gas sales

variables.notes: Used explicit revenue line first; included subtotal as lower-priority fallback in case label usage changes across periods.

final_choice.row_label: Changes in over / underlift positions and production inventory

variables.notes: R:c. Candidate list was empty. Selected 'Production expenses' from the full preview as the closest direct production/service cost line for an upstream oil and gas company. Manual review recommended because other lines such as 'Changes in over / underlift positions and production inventory' could also affect cost of sales presentation.

candidates.why: Explicit overhead/administrative expense line; preferred single SG&A row under the hierarchy.

candidates.row_label: Salary and other employee benefits expenses
candidates.why: Potential SG&A component, but components should not be used when an explicit SG&A row exists.
Potential SG&A/overhead component, but components should not be used when an explicit SG&A row exists.

variables.notes: CR:nc|high. R:c. Explicit SG&A row exists, so selected only that row and excluded component/detail rows.
No dedicated research and development line is present. 'Exploration and evaluation expenses' is not treated as R&D for this mapping.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense and fees from loans and borrowings

candidates.why: Recurring interest expense component on shareholder loan.
Finance-cost bucket may include non-interest or mixed items; less preferred than explicit interest rows.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense and fees from loans and borrowings

variables.notes: Selected granular recurring interest expense rows and excluded 'Finance costs - Other' because it appears mixed/non-pure and changes sign in some years.

candidates.why: Best available equity line; no separate parent-equity line is shown.
Same concept with alternate capitalization; useful as fallback if label varies by extraction/version.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity line is present, so used total equity as BE and set MIB to empty to avoid double counting.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line is present on the balance sheet.
